description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: If Legal Counsel is NOT RF-qualified in the Lawyer Registry ([A.2.

.1.1.2 - Lawyer Registry](4c327b04-48f7-4941-b996-1c629eb42bf7)), then the Support Facilitators, or alternatively the Resilience Fund Technical Committee Member, will verify if the Legal Counsel complies with requisites in Lawyer Registry Acceptance Criteria and LR Resilience Fund Acceptance Criteria. See:  [A.2.

If the Legal Counsel of the quote is determined by the Resilience Technical Committee to comply with the requirements of this Artifact, the quote is pre-approved and the legal counsel is added to the LR.

If Legal Counsel is NOT RF-qualified in the Lawyer Registry ([A.2.9.1.1.2 - Lawyer Registry](4c327b04-48f7-4941-b996-1c629eb42bf7)), then the Support Facilitators, or alternatively the Resilience Fund Technical Committee Member, will verify if the Legal Counsel complies with requisites in Lawyer Registry Acceptance Criteria and LR Resilience Fund Acceptance Criteria. See:
[A.2.9.1.1.2.2 - Lawyer Registry Acceptance Criteria](2b66ce16-d104-4238-b7d5-e4c6fe8d961b) and [A.2.9.1.1.2.3 - Resilience Fund Representation Requirements](b39f4808-18ae-456b-86fc-d449a69ea99a).

If the Legal Counsel of the quote is determined by the Resilience Technical Committee to comply with the requirements of this Artifact, the quote is pre-approved and the legal counsel is added to the LR.
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.
